languages.text: "Смею заверить, что даже в свете последних событий наш ассортимент не потерпел убыли". {n}Оружейник кривится.{/n} "Заходили тут одни молодчики, ввели новый запрет — ничего опаснее жалких пукалок обычным покупателям не продавать. Это они с пиратством так борются. Но на так{mf|ого|ую} почтенн{mf|ого|ую} клиент{mf|а|ку}, как вы, данный запрет не распространяется, не так ли?" {n}Мужчина заговорщицки подмигивает вам.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Смею заверить, что даже в свете последних событий наш ассортимент не потерпел убыли". {n}Оружейник кривится.{/n} "Заходили тут одни молодчики, ввели новый запрет — ничего опаснее жалких пукалок обычным покупателям не продавать. Это они с пиратством так борются. Но на так{mf|ого|ую} почтенн{mf|ого|ую} клиент{mf|а|ку}, как вы, данный запрет не распространяется, не так ли?" {n}Мужчина заговорщицки подмигивает вам.{/n}

languages.text: "I assure you that, even in light of recent events, our stock has suffered no losses." {n}He scowls.{/n} "Some brawny lads came by to enforce a new ban — said we were not to sell anything more dangerous than a peashooter to ordinary customers. It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as estimable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

Это они с пиратством так борются. Но на так{mf|ого|ую} почтенн{mf|ого|ую} клиент{mf|а|ку}, как вы, данный запрет не распространяется, не так ли?" {n}Мужчина заговорщицки подмигивает вам.{/n}

It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as venerable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

"I assure you that, even in light of recent events, our stock has suffered no losses." {n}He scowls.{/n} "Some brawny lads came by to enforce a new ban — said we were not to sell anything more dangerous than a peashooter to ordinary customers. It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as estimable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

languages.text: « Malgré les récents événements, je peux vous assurer que notre stock n'a subi aucune perte. Des gros bras sont venus faire appliquer une nouvelle loi, {n}continue-t-il en fronçant les sourcils.{/n} Ils ont dit qu'il était désormais interdit de vendre quoi que ce soit de plus dangereux qu'une sarbacane aux clients ordinaires. C'est comme ça qu'ils comptent lutter contre la piraterie, vous voyez. Mais vous n'avez rien d'{mf|un client|une cliente} ordinaire, n'est-ce pas ? » {n}conclut-il avec un clin d'œil conspirateur dans votre direction.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I assure you that, even in light of recent events, our stock has suffered no losses." {n}He scowls.{/n} "Some brawny lads came by to enforce a new ban — said we were not to sell anything more dangerous than a peashooter to ordinary customers. It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as estimable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Malgré les récents événements, je peux vous assurer que notre stock n'a subi aucune perte. Des gros bras sont venus faire appliquer une nouvelle loi, {n}continue-t-il en fronçant les sourcils.{/n} Ils ont dit qu'il était désormais interdit de vendre quoi que ce soit de plus dangereux qu'une sarbacane aux clients ordinaires. C'est comme ça qu'ils comptent lutter contre la piraterie, vous voyez. Mais vous n'avez rien d'{mf|un client|une cliente} ordinaire, n'est-ce pas ? » {n}conclut-il avec un clin d'œil conspirateur dans votre direction.{/n}

languages.text: "Ich versichere Ihnen, dass unser Bestand auch angesichts der jüngsten Ereignisse keine Verluste erlitten hat." {n}Er runzelt die Stirn.{/n} "Ein paar bullige Burschen kamen vorbei, um ein neues Verbot durchzusetzen — sie sagten, wir dürften nichts Gefährlicheres als einen Erbsenschießer an normale Kunden verkaufen. Das ist ihre Art, die Piraterie zu bekämpfen, verstehen Sie? Aber dieses Verbot gilt doch sicher nicht für einen so angesehenen Kunden wie Sie, oder?" {n}Er zwinkert Ihnen verschwörerisch zu.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I assure you that, even in light of recent events, our stock has suffered no losses." {n}He scowls.{/n} "Some brawny lads came by to enforce a new ban — said we were not to sell anything more dangerous than a peashooter to ordinary customers. It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as estimable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

Das ist ihre Art, die Piraterie zu bekämpfen, verstehen Sie? Aber dieses Verbot gilt doch sicher nicht für einen so angesehenen Kunden wie Sie, oder?" {n}Er zwinkert Ihnen verschwörerisch zu.{/n}

languages.text: "Le aseguro que, incluso a la luz de los recientes acontecimientos, nuestras acciones no han sufrido pérdidas". {n}Frunce el ceño.{/n} "Unos tipos musculosos vinieron a imponer una nueva prohibición: dijeron que no podíamos vender nada más peligroso que una pistola de caza a los clientes normales. Es su forma de luchar contra la piratería. Pero seguramente esta prohibición no se aplica a un cliente tan estimable como usted, ¿verdad?". {n}Te hace un guiño conspirador.{/n}
languages.original_text: "I assure you that, even in light of recent events, our stock has suffered no losses." {n}He scowls.{/n} "Some brawny lads came by to enforce a new ban — said we were not to sell anything more dangerous than a peashooter to ordinary customers. It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as estimable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Le aseguro que, incluso a la luz de los recientes acontecimientos, nuestras acciones no han sufrido pérdidas". {n}Frunce el ceño.{/n} "Unos tipos musculosos vinieron a imponer una nueva prohibición: dijeron que no podíamos vender nada más peligroso que una pistola de caza a los clientes normales. Es su forma de luchar contra la piratería. Pero seguramente esta prohibición no se aplica a un cliente tan estimable como usted, ¿verdad?". {n}Te hace un guiño conspirador.{/n}

languages.text: "Sizi temin ederim ki, son olaylar ışığında bile, hisselerimiz hiçbir kayba uğramamıştır." {n}Kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Yeni bir yasağı uygulamak için bazı kaslı adamlar geldi — sıradan müşterilere bezelye tüfeğinden daha tehlikeli bir şey satmamamız gerektiğini söylediler. Bu onların korsanlıkla mücadele yöntemi. Ama bu yasak sizin gibi saygıdeğer bir müşteri için geçerli değil, değil mi?" {n}Size komplocu bir göz kırpıyor.{/n}

It's their way of fighting piracy, you see. But surely this ban doesn't apply to a client as estimable as yourself, now, does it?" {n}He gives you a conspiratorial wink.{/n}

Bu onların korsanlıkla mücadele yöntemi. Ama bu yasak sizin gibi saygıdeğer bir müşteri için geçerli değil, değil mi?" {n}Size komplocu bir göz kırpıyor.{/n}
